reports.title: Custom front-end UI for vibe coding
reports.topic: how to create my own front-end user interface for vibe coding
reports.summary: Builders are mostly forking or self-hosting CloudCLI (siteboon/claudecodeui) rather than inventing a vibe-coding shell from zero. DIY paths converge on spawn-CLI + WebSocket + React, while smaller wins include custom Claude Code status lines and design-token rules so agent-built UI does not look like AI slop.

reports.title: Essential GitHub repos for vibe coding
reports.topic: essential GitHub repositories for vibe coding
reports.summary: Provisional: Claude Code skills lists, awesome-cursorrules, easy-vibe, and anthropics/claude-code dominate the repo discourse.

reports.title: Gym app frontend templates on GitHub
reports.topic: gym app frontend design github template
reports.summary: Provisional: small DemoGym/FitForge/spottr repos plus FitPulse-style landing templates and Hevy-class UX signals.

reports.title: Where the vibe coding community hangs out
reports.summary: Provisional: awesome-list hubs, r/vibecoding showcases, and trap/cost debates define the community mood.

reports.title: How to organize files for vibe coding
reports.topic: vibe coding project structure file organization
reports.summary: Feature-first folders, AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md memory layer, and flat paths for AI-assisted coding.

reports.title: Skills that make vibe coding work
reports.summary: Provisional: fundamentals courses, trap warnings, and year-long builder retrospectives define the skills conversation.

reports.title: How to program weighted pull-ups
reports.summary: Provisional: heavy PRs (200lb / 50kg), 5x5 climbing programs, and warm-up/progression advice dominate the feed.
